articles.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

articles.title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
